items.title: Trump says US will hit Iran 'hard' again today
items.summary: The US president warns Iran "will have to pay the price" for taking too long to agree a deal, after Tehran vows retaliation to any attacks.

items.title: Three Indian sailors missing after US says it hit tanker in Gulf of Oman
items.summary: India's government said three Indian sailors were missing and 21 crew had been rescued after the hit on the Settebello off the coast of Oman.

items.title: Fireworks illuminate Barcelona's Sagrada Família during Pope visit
items.summary: Pope Leo XIV says Barcelona's iconic Sagrada Família is a masterpiece of "stones, colours and light" during his visit to Spain.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 英相座車驚見中國追蹤器 資料送中
items.summary: 〔國際新聞中心／綜合報導〕英國「每日郵報」（Daily Mail）十日報導，英國國會議員九日被告知，英國首相的公務車內被發現安裝來自中國的追蹤器。這個追蹤器是在車內從中國進口的密封零件中發現的，在二〇二三年的一次安全掃描中首度曝光，引發外界對於北京積極監控當時保守黨政府首長的擔憂。 如今證實，該設…

items.title: 親中派 日前眾議長河野洋平逝世
items.summary: 〔駐日特派員林翠儀／東京十日報導〕日本前眾議院議長、自民黨總裁河野洋平八日去世，享壽八十九歲。河野為日本「親中派」的代表性人物之一，二〇〇一年擔任外務大臣時曾反對發給前總統李登輝訪日簽證。他在一九九三年發表有關慰安婦問題的「河野談話」，長期成為日本歷史認識問題爭議的根源之一。河野長子即為前外相河野太…
